parsed.production_notes: The video combines a 3D animated AI avatar on the top half with a human recorded via smartphone on the bottom half. The AI avatar exhibits slightly unnatural lip-sync and a static, rendered background.

characters.appearance: Young female, 3D animated style, fair complexion, wavy red hair, large green eyes. She has a stylized, cartoonish look typical of 3D animation.
characters.wardrobe: Simple white top and small crescent moon earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, light complexion, dark hair, short beard and mustache. He has a natural, everyday appearance.
characters.wardrobe: Blue t-shirt with red and white striped sleeves, and a white wireless earbud in his right ear.

scenes.setting: Top: blurred vanity mirror with lights. Bottom: plain white wall with a light switch.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a 3D animated young woman with wavy red hair, looks directly at the camera. She rests her chin on her right hand. The background is blurred, showing what appears to be a vanity mirror with round lights. Her expression is friendly and attentive.

Character B, a young man with a short beard, looks directly at the camera. The background is a plain white wall with a light switch visible. He smiles and speaks enthusiastically, reacting to the conversation.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with a 3D animated female avatar on top and a live-action young man on the bottom. They are engaged in a conversation. Text overlays appear in the center of the screen, displaying the dialogue. A banner of US flags is at the top. Green checkmarks and red crosses appear to indicate correct or incorrect pronunciation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Vamos praticar seu inglês. [Let's practice your English.]
Character B says: Okie dokie. [Okie dokie.]
Character A says: Repete depois de mim. Hello. [Repeat after me. Hello.]
Character B says: Hello. [Hello.]
Character A says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character B says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character A says: Fala como eu. Thank you. [Speak like me. Thank you.]
Character B says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character A says: Você consegue responder a essa pergunta? What's your name? [Can you answer this question? What's your name?]
Character B says: My name Gustavo. [My name Gustavo.]
Character A says: Quase! Diz: "My name is." [Almost! Say: "My name is."]
Character B says: My name is Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Mandou bem. [Well done.]
Character B says: Thank you. [Thank you.]
Character A says: Incrível! Você arrasou na pronúncia! Baixe o Praktika e pratique seu inglês com tutores de IA! [Incredible! You nailed the pronunciation! Download Praktika and practice your English with AI tutors!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Vamos praticar seu inglês.
Okie dokie.
Repete depois de mim.
Hello.
Thank you.
Fala como eu.
Você consegue responder a essa pergunta?
What's your name?
My name Gustavo.
Quase! Diz:
"My name is."
My name is Gustavo.
Mandou bem.
Thank you.
Incrível!
Você arrasou na pronúncia!
Baixe o Praktika e pratique seu inglês com tutores de IA!

scenes.visual_description: A white screen with a purple app icon in the center. Below the icon is the app name in purple text. At the bottom are two black buttons for app stores.
scenes.on_screen_text:
praktika.ai
GET IT ON Google Play
Available on the App Store
